scripts.kill:wrangler: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \"Name = 'node.exe'\" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'wrangler' -and $_.CommandLine -match ' dev' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.preview:clean: pnpm run kill:wrangler && astro build && wrangler dev
scripts.deploy:clean: pnpm run kill:wrangler && astro build && wrangler deploy
